description: VERIFIED LIVE: Product Hunt via content-script DOM extraction (Product Hunt's API is OAuth/approval-gated). Product Hunt sits behind a Cloudflare bot check, but it clears for a real browser session and then renders the ranked products in the page — these tools read them straight from the DOM of your open Product Hunt tab. Navigate the tab to the homepage / a daily or weekly leaderboard, let the page finish loading, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 41 ranked products with name, url and upvote count extracted correctly.

tools.name: producthunt_leaderboard
tools.description: Ranked products on the current Product Hunt page (the homepage, /leaderboard/daily/… or /leaderboard/weekly/…). Navigate the tab there and let it finish loading first. Returns each product's rank+name, product url and upvote count. VERIFIED.
